findings.description: All 4 objectives have partial or thin mapping completeness — none have reached complete status.
findings.suggested_resolution: Add primary mappings to move at least one objective above the 80% completeness threshold.

findings.description: Objective(s) with primary_count ≤ 2: OBJ-003(primary=1), OBJ-004(primary=2). Thin primary coverage reduces confidence in objective ownership.
findings.suggested_resolution: Reclassify supporting capabilities as primary where direct service to the objective can be demonstrated, or add new primary capabilities.

findings.description: Overall evidence quality is weak. Current capability-objective mapping evidence is insufficient to support high-confidence governance decisions.
findings.suggested_resolution: Generate and approve mapping recommendations via pcae strategic-state-summary to build evidence reports; target moderate evidence quality.

findings.description: Track(s) actively growing beyond 2×median(6=12): multi_runtime(13 phases). Active expansion of a single track may indicate over-investment.
findings.suggested_resolution: Review whether the growing track requires further expansion or has reached sufficient depth for current objectives.

rationale: 4 finding(s) present. Human-initiated refresh via --refresh flag. Review is advisory only; binding=False.
